# 🔀 Pull Request Template

## 📘 Summary
Describe the purpose of this PR.  
Example: Implement Spring Cloud Config Server for centralized configuration management.

## 🧱 Related Issues
Fixes #<issue_number>  
Related to #<issue_number>

## 🧩 Changes Included
- [ ] Added new feature
- [ ] Updated configuration
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor / Code cleanup
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test coverage improvement

## ⚙️ Technical Details
- Mention important classes, endpoints, or configurations changed.
- Include key annotations, frameworks, or libraries used.

## ✅ How to Test
1. Checkout this branch  
2. Run `mvn spring-boot:run` or start Docker container  
3. Verify endpoint `/actuator/health` and config loading works.

## 🧾 Checklist
- [ ] Code compiles successfully  
- [ ] Unit tests written and passing  
- [ ] Integration tests passing  
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in code  
- [ ] Updated documentation (README / API spec / Config repo)  
- [ ] Peer reviewed and approved  

## 🧠 Additional Context
Add screenshots, diagrams, or links to architecture documentation if relevant.

## 👥 Reviewers
@STARONE-INFOTECH/backend-developers
